summary: Exceptional matrix recording with superb separation and detail, delivering a clean master copy of the concert.
review: The reviewer notes that this is the master copy taken from a line feed recorded at their seats using a Yamaha‑mixed chain of multiple decks (300‑ and 421‑series). The tape shows amazing instrument separation, no drop‑outs and far more clarity than previous Memorex recordings, making it an outstanding listening source despite the lack of musical commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review, but it is a 5‑star rating focused on exceptional recording quality; no performance details are available, so the overall score reflects strong technical merit with moderate confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Master copy from seat line feed using Yamaha mixer and 8‑15 decks patched together; excellent separation, clear detail, no tape drop‑outs, superior to earlier Memorex metal tape recordings.
